name: 🧪 Suggest a project
about: Propose a new portfolio project brief that earns a slot in the curated 12
title: "[Project] <short name>"
labels: project, contribution
assignees: ''
---

## The project in one line

<!-- e.g. "Production RAG over a real corpus with hybrid retrieval, reranking, citations, and a RAGAS eval report." -->

## What distinct skill does it prove?

<!-- We only add a brief if it proves something no existing brief already does.
     RAG-with-evals · agent orchestration · structured extraction · fine-tuning ·
     from-scratch · serving/LLMOps · multimodal · guardrails · voice … -->

## Who does it impress? (be specific)

<!-- Which role / loop reacts to this project? AI Engineer, RAG Engineer, LLM Engineer,
     AI Product Engineer, Forward-Deployed Engineer, GTM Engineer … -->

## Does it have an eval layer and a deploy path?

- [ ] ✅ Yes — I can name concrete metrics (e.g. recall@20, faithfulness, p95 latency, $/1k tok) **and** a place to ship it (Vercel / Modal / Railway / HF Spaces).
- [ ] ⚠️ Not yet — help me figure out how to measure and deploy it.

> A project with no eval and no deploy is a tutorial, not a portfolio project. Those don't ship here.

## Does it overlap an existing brief?

<!-- Check projects/ first. If it's close to an existing one, we'd rather improve that brief. -->

## Difficulty

- [ ] 🟢 Beginner  · [ ] 🟡 Intermediate  · [ ] 🔴 Advanced

## Reference repos / resources (optional but appreciated)

<!-- Typed + license + approx stars: 💻 owner/repo — MIT, ~30k — one line why. -->
